name: blender-codex-connector
description: Codex plugin scaffold for the Blender Codex MCP server

interface.shortDescription: Use Blender through the local MCP bridge.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex plugin scaffold that points Codex at the Blender Codex MCP server so users can inspect scenes, run Blender Python, sync cameras, capture viewport screenshots, and export GLB files.
defaultPrompt: Sync the camera to the current viewport.
Export the selected model to GLB.
